channel.title: Cradle Blog
channel.description: Longer-form writing about what we're building and why.

item.title: Chat is for exploration. Work is for finishing.
item.description: Conversations are great for understanding problems, but real work has an objective, an environment, and a delivery. Cradle Work is a new concept built for finishing.

item.title: Session Await: agents that know how to wait
item.description: Your agent pushed a PR and it's waiting for CI — but you don't have to wait with it. Session Await suspends a session on a condition and resumes it the moment the condition fires.

item.title: Run four agents on the same codebase. At the same time.
item.description: Love Claude Code? Run four of them. Cradle orchestrates every agent as a parallel worker — each with its own task, kanban card, and live status, none of them tripping over each other.

item.title: Conversation Bridge: keep your agent sessions going from Slack
item.description: Conversation Bridge connects external conversation platforms to Cradle Chat Sessions, so work doesn't have to stop at the desktop window. The first Bridge plugin supports Slack.

item.title: Cradle dev builds are open for testing
item.description: After roughly two months of development, the first public dev build of Cradle Desktop is available. Here's what we're testing and where the current edges are.
